title: The Boaster
content:
In the house, in the market, the streets,
    Everywhere he was boasting his feats;
    Till one said, with a sneer,
    "Let us see it done here!
    What's so oft done with ease, one repeats."

    Deeds Not Words
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "The Boaster"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
